news.t: Visual Drill Results from Teuton's Ram Property -- Golden Triangle, British Columbia
ProShares Launches Groundbreaking Suite of Dynamic Buffer ETFs

overview.description: The ProShares Nasdaq-100 Dynamic Buffer ETF (QB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq-100 Dynamic Buffer index. The fund tracks an index that invests in the Nasdaq-100 stocks while employing an options strategy designed to provide capped gains and buffer against the first 1% to 5% of Nasdaq-100s losses. QB was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches Groundbreaking Suite of Dynamic Buffer ETFs
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares Dynamic Buffer ETFs capture gains and target downside protection with a patent-pending approach that adapts daily to expected volatility.
